if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND h.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND h.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdContentChgHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm FROM pdh_prod_content_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = h.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id WHERE h.hist_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdContentChgHist :: selectList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm FROM pdh_prod_content_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = h.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdContentChgHist :: selectPageList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm FROM pdh_prod_content_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = h.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(h.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdContentChgHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM pdh_prod_content_chg_hist h
